missingDocs.name: The Knight with a Hundred Heads

missingItems.name: A long hood with a veil hiding my face
Objects and small things that float under my cloak
A piece of ivy that has remained clinging to my left arm
The diary in which I wrote about my sad life before the curse
A reinforced case containing the flesh of the God Under the Mine
A small rosary donated by someone I don’t remember
Dark Ego - Mad like a Hatter
A valuable and improbably tall top hat
A complete set of over twenty watches
A modified gun that can shoot multifunction bullets
A red cape of fine workmanship, embroidered with the coat of arms of the Order
A wolf mask carved in wood
A broken clay doll, a memento of one of my few happy memories of my mother
A fang from the leader of my old pack
A rag doll depicting a well-dressed girl, a gift from my beloved grandmother
A swallow-shaped hair clip, a gift from my mother
An old gun, a gift from a group of seven mercenaries who defended me for a long time
The coat of arms of my noble family
A few small animals from the woods that follow me, attracted by my smell
Dark Ego - One Thousand and One Nights
A veil of red silk with which to cover my face
A bag full of gifts given by adoring nobles, who had been enthralled by the stories I told
A small dagger coated with poison
The comb with which I brushed the hair of my beloved sister
The egg of a strange creature that was given to me as a gift by Sinbad, the Traveler of a Thousand Seas
A silver headband, a gift from someone I have forgotten
A small diary where I transcribe my dreams
An ancient coin engraved with the word Camelot
Two wooden dolls I hold in my sleep, a witch and a warlock
Always in the Middle of Trouble
A map to the famous Field of Miracles
A small bag with some junk taken from the stomach of a fish
A miraculous medicine, gift of a Fairy
Dark Ego - Alice of Other Worlds
A watch, a gift from someone I met on my travels
A deck of cards which is missing the queen of hearts
Dark Ego - Beasts in Body and Soul
A leather whip and metal needles
A bag with dried meat with which to keep Dionysus’ hunger at bay
A poisoned stiletto that I keep hidden for any eventuality
